name: InnotreeKNX
description: The library's single public include (InnotreeKNX.h) and nothing else. Sits alone at the top of the DAG: it pulls in the concrete KnxDriver + KnxCoordinator + KnxValue + every KnxObject intent header, then defines class InnotreeKNX : public KnxCoordinator, which owns a KnxDriver and is built from a physical-address string. A sketch writes only #include <InnotreeKNX.h>. Header-only and Arduino-only (it pulls the driver) — native tests include KnxCoordinator.h and the object headers directly and never touch this library.
